hero.badge: IT Company from Târgu Mureș, Romania
hero.title: Digital Solutions
hero.subtitle: We build custom software, mobile apps, presentation websites, online stores, automation solutions and digital marketing strategies tailored to your business needs. We work with clients worldwide.

services.title: Our
services.subtitle: From idea to final product — we provide complete solutions for your business digital transformation.

software.title: Custom Software
software.description: Tailored applications built exactly for your business needs — from ERP and CRM to specialized platforms.

websites.title: Presentation Websites
websites.description: Modern, fast and SEO-optimized websites that turn visitors into clients. Unique design, built for your brand.

ecommerce.title: Online Stores
ecommerce.description: Complete e-commerce solutions with inventory management, online payments, and optimized shopping experience.

automation.title: Service Automation
automation.description: We automate your business's repetitive processes — reduce costs, increase efficiency, eliminate human errors.

api.title: API & Integrations
api.description: We connect your systems with external services — payments, shipping, invoicing, CRM, marketing and more.

consulting.title: IT Consulting
consulting.description: We guide you in choosing the right solution for your business — analysis, strategy and technical architecture.

marketing.title: Marketing & Advertising
marketing.description: Specialists in digital marketing, advertising, social media and brand strategy. We've collaborated with major well-known brands and know what works.

mobile.title: Mobile Applications
mobile.description: We develop native and cross-platform apps for Android and iOS — from concept and UX design, to publishing on the App Store and Google Play.

about.title: About
about.paragraph1: We are a team of IT and marketing specialists from Târgu Mureș, Romania, with a passion for technology and innovation. We create complete digital solutions — from software and websites to marketing strategies and advertising — for businesses in Romania and worldwide.
about.paragraph2: Each project is treated with utmost seriousness — from initial analysis and design, to implementation, testing and post-launch support. We have collaborated with major well-known brands and know how to build digital presences that generate real results.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Clean, performant and scalable code for lasting projects

speed.title: Speed
speed.description: We deliver on time, without compromising quality

support.title: Support
support.description: We are with you even after your project launches

global.title: Global Reach
global.description: Working with clients from Romania, Europe and worldwide

technologies.title: Modern
technologies.subtitle: We use the latest technologies to build performant, secure and scalable solutions.

portfolio.title: Completed
portfolio.subtitle: Some of the projects and products we have created.

smartstudent.description: Mobile application for students + full admin dashboard — content management, user administration and reporting.

t1.name: Raluca Ursu
t1.text: CST Systems delivered an exceptional product in record time. Communication was impeccable and the result exceeded our expectations.

t2.name: Av. Rareș U.
t2.text: The administration platform built by CST Systems greatly simplified our internal operations. The dashboard is intuitive, the reports are clear, and the team was extremely professional throughout the entire project.

t3.name: Moldovan Călin
t3.text: Professional team, excellent code quality and on-time delivery. We continue to work with CST Systems for all our projects.
